content: I'm thinking about starting a podcast about wedding planning. Do you think it's a good idea?
That sounds like a great idea! What would you focus on in the podcast?
Mostly tips for couples, vendor spotlights, and maybe some behind-the-scenes of my agency. I'm Dana, by the way, I run Moore Weddings.
Nice to meet you, Dana! Moore Weddings - that's a memorable name. How long have you been running your agency?
About 8 years now. It's been quite a journey. I'm actually 52 and this is my second career after being an elementary school teacher.
That's a fascinating career change! What inspired you to switch to wedding planning?
Honestly, I got into it when I was planning my own daughter's wedding. I loved every minute of it and realized I had a knack for it.
That's wonderful! So what's your latest project? You mentioned something new?
Oh right! I'm developing an online course for aspiring wedding planners. It's been taking up all my free time lately.
That sounds ambitious! How's it going so far?
